history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with short, dark, slightly messy hair and a warm smile is looking directly at the camera. He is wearing a black t-shirt with the white text "PIXMA" printed on the right side of his chest, and blue jeans. His left hand is raised, with his index and pinky fingers extended in a gesture that resembles a "rock on" or "shaka" sign.

He is seated in front of a weathered, light green wall. To his left, a corrugated metal roll-up door is partially visible. Above the door and the wall, there's a rustic, wooden-framed roof structure with corrugated metal sheeting. A simple shelf is attached to the green wall, holding a few items, including what appears to be a folded grey bag or cloth. On the wall itself, there are some faint markings and a small poster or sign with text that is difficult to read clearly. To the right of the man, a broom leans against the wall, and a large plastic bag filled with goods, possibly snacks or food items, hangs from a hook.

The lighting suggests it's nighttime or a dimly lit area, with a strong, somewhat harsh light source illuminating the man from the front-left, casting subtle shadows. The background is dark and out of focus, hinting at trees or foliage. The overall color palette is dominated by the contrast between the man's dark clothing and the bright green wall, with muted tones in the background and roof structure. The mood is casual and friendly, with the man's relaxed pose and smile conveying a sense of ease. The style is candid and appears to be a snapshot taken in an outdoor, possibly urban or semi-rural, setting at night.
